textPlain: I think Hungry Hungry Hippos was the board game that taught me that advertisements lie. They were not, in fact, "fun fun fun by the ton ton ton." https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lBYcWhQae98

A sad indictment of modern times:1. Invited to play physical game with friends 
2. Only wanted to play a specific game which had no takers
3. Decided to play by self
4. Found that laborious
5. Automated humans out of the equation entirely
6. ???
Hug of death? If you need assistance, email on my profile.
Looks great!  Now add AI and you’ll be page 1 of HN!!
